Related Entities

  • hospital NOVANT HEALTH BRUNSWICK MEDICAL CENTER 4-star overall rating
  • hospital J ARTHUR DOSHER MEMORIAL HOSPITAL
  • hospital STRATEGIC BEHAVIORAL CENTER-LELAND
  • snf Autumn Care of Shallotte 3-star, 100 beds
  • snf Brunswick Cove Nursing Center 3-star, 175 beds
  • snf Liberty Commons Nursing & Rehab Center of Southpor 3-star, 99 beds
  • snf Brunswick Rehabilitation and Healthcare Center 1-star, 90 beds
  • snf Brunswick Health & Rehab Center 1-star, 100 beds
  • condition Cholesterol screening among adults Prevalence: 91.5%
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
